A

age - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
 
age - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
 
AMERICAN_DREAM - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
Life should be better, richer and fuller for everyone regardless of their social status, which attracted a lot of immigrants in the 1930s in search for a better life for their future generations.
AmericanDaughter - Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
 

C

CAPITALISM_AMERICA - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
The modern American society in the 1980s that valued individualism, freedom, and capitalism
ChineseMother - Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
ChineseMother suyuanWoo = new ChineseMother("Suyuan Woo", HistoricalEnvironment.WARTIME_CHINA); ChineseMother lindoJong = new ChineseMother("Lindo Jong", HistoricalEnvironment.PATRIARCHAL_CHINA); ChineseMother yingYing = new ChineseMother("Ying-ying St.
CONCUBINE_CHINA - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
Concubinage system: In China between 1920 and 1930, males could have multiple concubines, who were considered inferior to the primary wife, with their status declining based on their numbers
conflictWithMom - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
 

E

EraMismatchException - Exception Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
Throws custom exceptions when a daughter attempts to judge her mother's actions without loading the proper historical dependencies.
EraMismatchException(String) - Constructor for exception class JoyLuck.newHistorism.EraMismatchException
Generate a historical conflict error.
expressLove() - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother

historicalEnvironment - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
 
HistoricalEnvironment - Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
Defines historical and political contexts that determine the behaviors of characters
HistoricalEnvironment() - Constructor for class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
 

I

individualTrauma - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
The trauma she experienced under her origin environment

name - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
The character's name

O

originEnvironment - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
The specific historical era that shaped the mother's worldview

P

PATRIARCHAL_CHINA - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
Feudal patriarchy: In 1920s China, women had little agency, often forced into submission, concubinage, or arranged marriage at a very young age.
preserveFace(String) - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
Executes the Chinese ideology of maintaining social hierarchy.

R

reasonToAmerica - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
 

S

setReasonToAmerica(String) - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
 
showInnerStength() - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
 
showInnerStrength() - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
 
SubalternSilenceException - Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
 
SubalternSilenceException() - Constructor for class JoyLuck.newHistorism.SubalternSilenceException
 
swallowTearsAndSilence() - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
Deprecated.
This method was deprecated as women no longer needed to swallow tears and keep silent in modern society

T

transmitHeritage() - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
Triggers when a mother attemps to warn her daughter using Chinese historical allegory

U

useInvisibleStength(String) - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
Executes the Chinese way to escape arranged marriage: use invisible strength.

W

WARTIME_CHINA - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
Second Sino- Japanese War: A violent eight-year period (1937-1945) where China was invaded by Japan.
